troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Topic Template
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Use this template guidance to write troubleshooting topics with a direct symptom-to-resolution path.

troublebody.p: Problem: Describe one observable failure symptom in operational terms.
Cause: List one or more concrete causes tied to artifacts, commands, or contract mismatches.

ul.li: Provide deterministic checks in command form.
Map each check to an expected result.
End with the corrective action and rerun verification step.
